item.title: One UI 9 Watch beta rumored: Samsung might have health reports ready and waiting

item.description: Early rumors say Samsung is preparing to enlist Galaxy Watch users for a One UI 9 Watch beta.

item.title: This Garmin watch was instantly iconic when it dropped back in 2023 — and now it's 50% OFF at Amazon

item.content:encoded: Despite its age, the Garmin epix Pro (Gen 2) remains a powerful fitness watch with loads of features and GPS tracking.

item.title: Android tablets have a problem: Chrome's not working, but Google's racing to fix it

item.description: Android tablet users report problems with Chrome, as an error message renders the browser inoperable.
item.content:encoded: Android tablet users report problems with Chrome, as an error message renders the browser inoperable.

item.title: How to use Gemini to track and split group expenses — for FREE!
item.itunes:title: How to use Gemini to track and split group expenses — for FREE!
item.itunes:author: namerah.saud-fatmi@futurenet.com (Namerah Saud Fatmi)
item.itunes:summary: Forget about paid apps like Splitwise. Instead, make the most of Gemini by using it to track and split shared expenses for trips, group expenses, and more!
item.description: Forget about paid apps like Splitwise. Instead, make the most of Gemini by using it to track and split shared expenses for trips, group expenses, and more!
item.content:encoded: Forget about paid apps like Splitwise. Instead, make the most of Gemini by using it to track and split shared expenses for trips, group expenses, and more!

item.title: 'When we started our studio, we were building the wrong games.' Millions of Meta Quest owners are playing games like Ug VR every month, and they're redefining VR as we once knew it

item.itunes:author: Android Central[RSS+]

item.description: Many thought games like Assassin's Creed, Batman, and The Walking Dead were the future of VR. Turns out, they were wrong.
item.content:encoded: Many thought games like Assassin's Creed, Batman, and The Walking Dead were the future of VR. Turns out, they were wrong.

item.title: Samsung Wallet’s new digital passport sounds convenient, but the internet isn’t sold

item.itunes:author: techkritiko@gmail.com (Jay Bonggolto)

item.content:encoded: Samsung’s new TSA-approved digital ID sounds convenient for Galaxy users, but privacy fears, buggy airport support, and CLEAR skepticism are already raising red flags online.

item.content:encoded: Google recently upgraded the automation-building experience in the Home app, and you can use it to build smarter automations right now.

item.title: The Razr Plus 2026 is the same but better (and more expensive), but that's not actually a problem. Here's why
